_comment: Example SecureFusion XRPL anchor transaction for the single-channel-event.json manifest. Field values shown here are illustrative; real transactions will have sequence, signature, and hash assigned by the network and signing process. The Memos array is the canonical SecureFusion structure.

Memos._meta: Memo 1: SF1.bundle - 50-byte binary header (hex-encoded). Contains bundleHash || eventId(raw 16-byte UUID) || ingestSource(1) || channelCount(1).
Memo 2: SF1.event - canonical event manifest JSON, hex-encoded UTF-8 bytes. Sorted keys, no whitespace.
Memo 3: SF1.sig - Ed25519 signature (64 bytes, hex-encoded) over the concatenated raw bytes of Memo 1 and Memo 2 payloads.
